Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: violin family instruments [300202250], fiddles [300042220], lutelike chordophones: bowed [300211800], lutelike chordophones [300224192], chordophones [300041641], sound devices by acoustical characteristics [300041621], sound devices (equipment) [300387677], Sound Devices (hierarchy name) [300041619], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Largest and lowest-pitched instruments of the violin family, having four, or more rarely, five strings, and varying considerably in size and shape.

Source.Source_ID: 2000030041/Sadie, New Grove Dictionary of Musical Instruments (1984)

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Se refiere a los instrumentos más grandes y de registro más bajo de la familia del violín, que tienen cuatro, o rara vez cinco cuerdas, y que varían considerablemente en tamaños y formas
De grootste en laagst gestemde instrumenten van de vioolfamilie, met vier, soms vijf, snaren; ze kunnen aanzienlijk variëren in grootte en vorm.
提琴家族裡體積最大、音調最低的樂器，通常具有四根琴弦，少數為五根琴弦，琴的尺寸和形狀迥異。
Instrumentos maiores e mais graves da família do violino, tendo quatro, ou mais raramente, cinco cordas e variando consideravelmente em tamanho e forma
Größtes und tiefstes Streichinstrument der Violinfamilie mit vier – oder seltener – fünf Saiten, das erheblich in Größe und Form variieren kann.

Source.Source_ID: 2000011401/Diagram Group, Musical Instruments of the World (1976)
2000029211/Montagu, World of Baroque and Classical Musical Instruments (1979)
2000030041/Sadie, New Grove Dictionary of Musical Instruments (1984)

2000030041/Sadie, New Grove Dictionary of Musical Instruments (1984)
2000030041/Sadie, New Grove Dictionary of Musical Instruments (1984)

Term_Source.Page: Suggested as lead-in term at AAT outside review, 7/92

Source.Source_ID: 2000030041/Sadie, New Grove Dictionary of Musical Instruments (1984)

Term_Source.Page: Kenton Meyer, Librarian, Curtis Institute of Music, Philadelphia, 2/92
bass viola da gamba; on Continent, a small double bass
